if.test: filterType == 'company' and filterIds != null and filterIds.size() > 0
filterType == 'region' and filterIds != null and filterIds.size() > 0

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date, '%Y-%m') AS periodMonth FROM longterm_transactions t WHERE t.contract_start_date IS NOT NULL AND t.transaction_period_id IN (4, 5) AND t.transaction_type_id IN (1, 3) AND t.gen_type_id IN (1, 2, 3) ORDER BY periodMonth

SELECT '年度' AS period, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS coalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS windAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS solarAmount, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS coalPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS windPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS solarPrice FROM longterm_transactions t JOIN companies c ON c.id = t.company_id WHERE t.transaction_period_id = 1 AND t.contract_start_date <= #{contractEndDate} AND t.contract_end_date >= #{contractStartDate} AND t.transaction_type_id IN (1, 3) AND t.gen_type_id IN (1, 2, 3)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date, '%Y-%m') AS period, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS coalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS windAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS solarAmount, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 1 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS coalPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 3 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS windPrice, COALESCE( SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.gen_type_id = 2 THEN t.chng_transaction_amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 0 ) AS solarPrice FROM longterm_transactions t JOIN companies c ON c.id = t.company_id WHERE t.transaction_period_id IN (4, 5) AND t.contract_start_date BETWEEN #{contractStartDate} AND #{contractEndDate} AND t.transaction_type_id IN (1, 3) AND t.gen_type_id IN (1, 2, 3)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date, '%Y-%m')
